.infographic * {

.main-infographic {
	width: 93%;
	margin: 0 auto;
}
.infographic {
	background: #C7EAFA;
	padding: 60px 0 0;
}
.started {
	background: #0A2750;
	color: #fff;
	text-align: center;
	position: relative;
	width: calc(100% + 60px);
	left: -30px;
	font-size: 42px;
	line-height: 50px;
	font-family: "Lato", arial, sans-serif;
	font-weight: 900;
	padding: 15px 10px;
}
.started::after {
	content: "";
	border-right: 15px solid transparent;
	position: absolute;
	right: 0px;
	bottom: -30px;
	z-index: 9;
	border-left: 15px solid #999999;
	border-top: 15px solid #999999;
	border-bottom: 15px solid transparent;
}
.started::before {
	content: "";
	border-right: 15px solid #999999;
	position: absolute;
	left: 0px;
	bottom: -30px;
	z-index: 9;
	border-left: 15px solid transparent;
	border-top: 15px solid #999999;
	border-bottom: 15px solid transparent;
}
.upper-content {
	padding: 0 40px;
	background: linear-gradient(#C7EAFA, #CCEBF2);
}
.infographic .heading-section {
	text-align: center;
	margin-top: 40px;
}
.infographic .heading-section h3 {
	font-size: 30px;
	line-height: 42px;
	font-weight: 600;
}
.infographic .heading-section h4 {
	font-size: 30px;
	line-height: 40px;
	font-style: italic;
	color: #0C2948;
	font-weight: 600;
}
.infographic .heading-section img {
	width: 100px;
	height: 100px;
	margin-bottom: 20px;
	object-fit: contain;
}
.twoCol-layout {
	display: flex;
	flex-flow: row wrap;
	justify-content: space-between;
}
.twoCol-layout .twoCol {
	width: 48%;
	text-align: center;
	position: relative;
}
.twoCol-layout .twoCol p {
	font-size: 30px;
	line-height: 42px;
}
.twoCol-layout .twoCol:first-child::after {
	content: "";
	position: absolute;
	right: -4%;
	width: 100%;
	height: 100%;
	border-right: 1px solid #718b95;
	top: 0;
}
.section-button {
	text-align: center;
	margin-top: 30px;
}
.btn-learn {
	color: #738b93;
	border: 1px solid #738b93;
	padding: 15px 30px;
	text-transform: uppercase;
	font-size: 16px;
	line-height: 19px;
	display: inline-block;
	margin-top: 10px;
	transition: .3s;
}
.btn-learn:hover,
.btn-learn:focus {
	background-color: #738b93;
	color: #fff;
	text-decoration: none;
}

	position: relative;
}
